title: muehlenbeckia tamnifolia var. quadrangulata
intro: Muehlenbeckia tamnifolia var. quadrangulata, also known as the Five-leaf ivy, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an anti-anxiety agent. Herbal preparations of Muehlenbeckia tamnifolia var. quadrangulata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
